title: MiguVerse
description: Modpack compatible with the MiguVerse server, designed to enhance immersion in Minecraft with and without VR, while maintaining the Vanilla essence and functioning in any environment.
body:
# ⚠️ Product deprecated, this modpack still available as this still working and works great, but no new updates will be made, we are going to make a new server in the future and provide better experience and modpack also fully compatible with all languages.
**⚠️ WARNING: This modpack is also functional in English, but it has been specifically designed for Spanish-speaking environments. No support will be provided for issues related to language settings, although I do offer support in English. ⚠️**

---
![MiguVerse server Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70020457475f41760ee057eccc97ba421e1cad52.png)

# **ENGLISH**

Welcome to **MiguVerse ModPack**! 🌟 This modpack has been carefully designed to enhance your **Minecraft** gameplay experience, keeping the **Vanilla** essence we all love, whether you play in VR or without VR. 😎

**MiguVerse ModPack** offers the best compatibility with the official **MiguVerse** spanish server (tienda.miguvt.com), but don't worry, it also works great on other servers and in Single Player mode. 🎮

### Key Features:
- **VR Compatibility**: Experience **Minecraft** like never before, with immersive enhancements for **VR** users.
- **Enhanced Vanilla Experience**: Maintain the classic **Minecraft** essence, with improvements that don’t alter traditional gameplay but add depth and quality of life.
- **Optimization and Compatibility**: Enjoy optimal performance, whether you're playing on the **MiguVerse** server or any other.

**Join our community and discover more about this modpack on our Discord server: [discordverse.miguvt.com](https://discordverse.miguvt.com).**

Ready to dive into the best **Minecraft** experience? See you in-game! 🎉

# **SPANISH**

¡Bienvenid@ a **MiguVerse ModPack**! 🌟 Este modpack ha sido cuidadosamente diseñado para mejorar tu experiencia de juego en **Minecraft**, manteniendo la esencia **Vanilla** que tod@s amamos, ya sea que juegues en VR o sin VR. 😎

**MiguVerse ModPack** te ofrece la mejor compatibilidad con el servidor oficial de **MiguVerse** (tienda.miguvt.com), pero no te preocupes, también funciona de maravilla en otros servidores y en modo Un Jugador. 🎮

### Características principales:
- **Compatibilidad VR**: Experimenta **Minecraft** como nunca antes, con mejoras en la inmersión para usuarios de **VR**.
- **Experiencia Vanilla mejorada**: Mantén la esencia clásica de **Minecraft**, con mejoras que no alteran el gameplay tradicional, pero que sí añaden profundidad y calidad de vida.
- **Optimización y compatibilidad**: Disfruta de un rendimiento óptimo, ya sea que juegues en el servidor de **MiguVerse** o en cualquier otro.

**Únete a nuestra comunidad y descubre más sobre este modpack en nuestro servidor de Discord: [discordverse.miguvt.com](https://discordverse.miguvt.com).**

¿List@ para sumergirte en la mejor experiencia de **Minecraft**? ¡Nos vemos en el juego! 🎉
